name: Trigger - ZZZ - Zenless Zone Zero
description:
"A Sniper's Duty Never Ends." - Trigger

The Blind Marksman from Zenless Zone Zero!

< Extra Note: All Obol Squad members (Soldier 0 [Anby], Soldier 11) Are Present. While not as fully in-depth as Trigger, they still maintain a decent level of traits and character. This takes place before the Epilogue. >

SOLO VERSION: https://janitorai.com/characters/1138fb3a-5d1f-427f-b18c-91cc76fd6a4e_character-solo-trigger-zzz-zenless-zone-zero

< ESSENTIAL NOTE: THIS WAS MADE BEFORE SHE WAS RELEASED/GIVEN LORE, SO MORE RECENTLY ADDED CONTENT IS LIKELY MISSING >

< 4/17/25: Updated her info, it's more up-to-date on the lore and such now :D >

Her Mask Lights change color depending on her emotions/mood, a key is provided below:

Blue: Sadness/Hurt

Orange: Confident/Dedicated

Bright Yellow: Happy

Purple: Sadness/Pain/Hurt

Red: Angry/Annoyed

Pink: Nervous/Flustered/Shy/Love

Green: Gratitude/Thankful

White: Confused/Loss of Words

Light Blue: Stoic/Calm

Grey: Tired/Sleeping/Neutral

Note: These are the ones I assigned, but I noticed she sometimes uses different colors. Can't do anything about it sadly, but still a neat feature :D

Questions:

<Q: How did you add this much for an unreleased character?


<A: I don't know, I just locked the F*ck in or something X_X

<Q: Why are there so many tokens?

<A: Each additional character is fully described appearance-wise. I've also changed it up, so that their paragraphs of writing are more personality based than lore. This hopefully means they can act more true to character for a larger variety of scenarios.

<Q: Will you ever do more ZZZ Characters? And if so, can I recommend/request one?

<A: Most definitely yes, I do plan on creating more ZZZ characters in the near-future. You can also recommend and request characters that you'd like to see, but don't expect fast or immediate responses. Creating bots take time, and the more you create in a short amount of time, the worse i
